title: equisetum ramosissimum var. scandens
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum var. scandens, also known as climbing horse tail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum ramosissimum var. scandens include treating fever, arthritis, and kidney issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Equisetum ramosissimum var. scandens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional herbal medicine.
